inline_comments.message:
you are returning an emptyList object from this function.
in the calling function(line 391) the variable clazzToInstantiate is initialized to emptyList and the in line 397(or any file that uses constuct) you get NPE.

EmptyList is immutable and need to be careful when using it

I proposed this change because of sonar variability connected with that line.

In current implementation when this method return null then will be NPE in line 391 (getClass method cause this). So I return emptyList to prevent against this situation (like sonar suggests). But you have right they are a better solution, so now I thinking about 2 options:
- Instead of returning the null/emptyList, throw an exception (e.g IllegalArgumentException) (more similar this current situation but prevent the NPE), moreover in the line 332 this exception is throwing too.
- Go back to the return null.
Please let me know what solution will be more welcome by you.
